initial_dialogue_state_list: You want to request a special seating arrangement at the expensive British restaurant in the west, such as a window seat or a quiet corner.
You want to book a train ticket with additional amenities such as a meal service or extra legroom for the trip from Cambridge to Stevenage on Monday.
You want to get a detailed itinerary including sightseeing recommendations and local events in Cambridge on the day of your restaurant booking and train travel.
